extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz sprinted to a hat-trick stage win at Suances, reclaiming the red jersey via 10-second bonus over CARAPAS who lost 3 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Teams chased 11:40 breakaway on puncher stage expecting sprinters eliminated, enabling GC opportunism with bonus seconds available.
MARTIN Guillaume attacked inside final kilometer as GC rider hunting KOM points, revealing mountain jersey defenders contest intermediate stages aggressively.
ROGLIC consistently targets bonus seconds on minor stages to manufacture GC gaps, three consecutive stage wins creating 10-second deltas.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: relegated yesterday, then dropped on minor climbs well before final 30km on puncher stage, signals poor climbing form
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: hat-trick wins plus sprinting for bonuses shows exceptional form depth heading into mountain weekend
rider_signals.CARAPAS Richard: negative: lost 3 seconds to Roglic in finale, conceding red jersey solely due to bonus second deficit reveals positioning weakness
